name: Name
invalid_password: Password must be 8+ characters with uppercase and a number
reset_description: Restore theme and language to their default values.
hero_badge: Free to use · No credit card required
hero_subtitle: The simple, powerful task manager that helps you stay focused, organized, and in control of every day.
features_title: Everything you need to stay productive
features_subtitle: Simple tools, powerful results. TaskHub keeps your workflow clean and focused.
feature_tasks_desc: Create, organize, and track tasks with priorities and due dates that keep you on schedule.
feature_categories_desc: Structure your work with custom categories and color-coded labels for instant visual clarity.
feature_tags_desc: Add flexible tags to any task for cross-category grouping and lightning-fast lookup.
feature_filtering_desc: Find any task instantly with powerful filters, sorting, and full-text search.
feature_secure_desc: Your data is protected with industry-standard security. We never share or sell your information.
feature_free_desc: TaskHub is free to use with no hidden fees. Your productivity shouldn't cost a fortune.
how_subtitle: Three simple steps to take full control of your tasks.
step1_desc: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card, no commitment.
step2_desc: Create tasks with priorities, due dates, categories, and tags.
step3_desc: Filter, sort, and complete tasks. Celebrate progress every day.
cta_subtitle: Join thousands of people who use TaskHub every day to stay focused and get things done.
footer_tagline: A simple, beautiful task manager built to help you focus on what matters.
